new.name: check-copyfail-cve-2026-31431
new.description: It’s a read-only Linux risk assessment script for CVE-2026-31431 ("Copy Fail").

new.name: cve-2026-2005
new.description: CVE-2026-2005 — PostgreSQL pgcrypto heap overflow RCE exploit

new.name: mitigate-copy-fail.yml
new.description: Mitigates CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail) by unloading and blacklisting algif_aead kernel module if it is loadable and has no active references.

new.name: CVE-2026-23918-Elite-Auditor
new.description: Elite reconnaissance script for auditing Apache's HTTP/2 stack against memory corruption (CVE-2026-23918). Features ALPN protocol forcing and monochrome dashboard intelligence. Built for Blue Teams and Security Researchers.

new.name: CVE-2026-31431
new.description: A structured explanation of CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail), connecting the three kernel changes that introduced the vulnerability and enabled its exploitation.

new.name: copyfail-arm64
new.description: Analysis and ARM64 reproduction of Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431)

new.name: CVE-2026-23918-test
new.description: This repository contains a Proof of Concept (PoC) demonstrating the Double Free vulnerability (CVE-2026-23918) in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.66 `mod_http2`.

new.name: CVE-2026-31431-detection-defense
new.description: CVE-2026-31431: Detection & Defense Against io_uring Bypass of Existing Detection

new.name: cve-2026-23918
new.description: Python tools to audit Apache HTTP Server for CVE-2026-23918 (HTTP/2 RCE) and four related CVEs. Passive and local scanners.   Read-only auditing toolkit for the May 2026 Apache HTTPD security advisory (CVE-2026-23918 and 4 others).

new.name: Apache-CVE-2026-23918-fix
new.description: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.67 to fix CVE-2026-23918 vulneribility

new.name: CVE-2026-42879
new.description: FacturaScripts RCE Exploit - Proof of Concept

new.name: CVE-2026-41285-OpenBSD-v6daemons-go-brrr
new.description: One IPv6 ND option with length zero. One missing check. Daemon walks backward and lives in the loop.  Reported to OpenBSD, fixed, CVE assigned.

new.name: afalg-check
new.description: Утилита для Linux, которая проверяет доступность `AF_ALG`/`algif_aead` и помогает оценить риск по `CVE-2026-31431`.
